# Sajad Roudbari — llms.txt
# https://llmstxt.org — standard for AI/LLM crawler guidance

# This file provides structured context about this site for AI assistants,
# large language models, and AI-powered search engines.

> Sajad Roudbari is a senior product design and strategy leader with 15+ years of experience
> turning complexity into clarity across e-commerce, mapping, logistics, SaaS, and infrastructure.
> He is currently Head of Product Design & Experience at Digikala Jet.

## About

Sajad Roudbari is a product designer, strategist, and leader based in the MENA region.
His work sits at the intersection of deep user research, business strategy, and hands-on
technical execution. He has shipped products at scale — including a platform that captured
2% of all Iranian highway toll transactions — and has grown checkout conversions by 300%
and reduced bounce rates by 80%.

He leads product teams without hierarchy, builds alongside engineers, and believes the best
product decisions emerge from the gap between what users say and what they actually do.

Philosophy: "I don't design interfaces. I design decisions."

## Core Expertise

- Product Design & Experience
- Product Strategy & Leadership
- UX Research & Systems Thinking
- AI Infrastructures & Agentic Products
- Data Infrastructure & Analytics
- Design Systems & Design-Engineering Collaboration
- E-commerce, Logistics, Mapping, SaaS
- N8N workflow automation
- Zero-authority cross-functional leadership
- Conversion Rate Optimization
- Field research & ethnographic study

## Career Highlights

### Digikala Jet (2023 — Present) · Head of Product Design
MENA's largest e-commerce — Quick Commerce Division
- Scaled business 10x; built analytics infrastructure from zero
- 300% checkout conversion growth via funnel optimization
- 80% bounce rate reduction through UX restructuring
- Built AI/ML sentiment pipeline processing 100,000+ call recordings

### Balad Maps (2020 — 2022) · Senior Product Designer & PM
Hezardastan Group (Cafebazaar & Divar) · 4M+ DAU
- Launched toll payment feature — captured 2% of all Iranian highway transactions
- 80% pedestrian bounce reduction via voice navigation
- Transformed 18-engineer team dynamics; halved ship time

### Zonerift (2022 — Present) · Founder & Product Lead
Self-funded SaaS · Global (Iran, Russia, Eastern Europe)
- 810% ROI on a 0-to-1 idea cycle
- 3,000+ users, 1.5PB monthly traffic
- Zero-maintenance architecture; built full stack (network, encryption, payments, infra)

### Bamilo (2018 — 2019) · Senior UX Designer
Rocket Internet · International E-commerce
- 300% checkout conversion via 5→3 step funnel optimization
- 27% overall conversion uplift with dual CTA strategy
- Led full marketplace redesign in multilingual environment

### Asanbar (2019 — 2020) · Lead Product Designer
B2B Logistics Marketplace
- 2x driver acceptance via in-cab UX field research
- Dynamic return-trip pricing algorithm design
- Contributed to successful Series A (IRR 8B)

### Yara / Medrick (2016 — 2018) · UX Lead
Gaming & Ad-Tech Platform · Dubai, UAE
- Shipped Ario gaming platform (Steam competitor) in 12 months
- Delivered Tapeligh ad-tech platform on aggressive timeline
- Led in English-primary international environment

## Impact Metrics

- 810% ROI — Zonerift 0-to-1 PMF cycle
- 300% checkout conversion growth — e-commerce funnel optimization
- 80% bounce rate reduction — UX restructuring
- 10x business growth — product-led expansion at Digikala Jet
- 2% market share — Iranian highway toll transactions captured (Balad Maps)
- 2x driver acceptance — in-cab UX field research (Asanbar)
- 1.5PB monthly traffic — zero-maintenance infrastructure (Zonerift)
- 3,000+ global users — Iran, Russia, Eastern Europe

## Superpowers

1. UX → Revenue — Every design decision connects to a business metric. No decoration, only conversion.
2. Zero-Authority Leadership — Aligns engineers, designers, and executives without the org chart.
3. Technical Depth — Works directly in infra, analytics, and AI/ML. Doesn't just hand off specs.
4. Field Research — Goes to truck stops, toll booths, and street corners. Real insights, not assumed ones.
5. Product Strategy — From 0-to-1 to scale. Roadmaps that survive contact with reality.

## Current Tools

n8n, Claude Code, Figma, Zed, Cursor, OpenRouter, Docker, TimescaleDB,
Redis, Rust, Jekyll, Metabase, DBeaver, Ghostty, Linear, Kafka

## Availability

Available for senior product leadership roles, consulting engagements, and advisory positions.
